data.body:
- remove the tally at the top
- add a third graph like the other two, but for all steps combined (still dimensioned by agent)
- improve the from/to selectors to show the current selections, also add a "last 24h"
- add a 4th component, a table showing the best agent by step, and the margin between the best agent and the agent after it.
data.title: Audit: UX Design Improvements
